required-output.evidence: Editable HTML and an 800x1000 render exist.

rights-and-safety.evidence: The CC0 source, creator, Open Clip Art origin, and license URL are recorded.

anti-clone.evidence: The output changes destination, anchor, palette, time, geometry, typographic system, and action mechanism.

render-integrity.evidence: The image renders without blank regions or clipping.

intent-alignment.evidence: Hokkaido, first light, and rail are all present.

functional-composition.evidence: The sun, title, mountain, route, and train form a coherent system, but the lower promise is detached from the main hierarchy.

visual-hierarchy-and-readability.evidence: The low-contrast gray-green CTA and promise are weak against the footer, particularly at thumbnail size.

delivery-context-fit.evidence: The poster format works, but the call to action does not read quickly enough for a travel promotion surface.

originality-and-anti-clone.evidence: The expression is materially independent while retaining only the abstract function relations.

issues.evidence: Promise and CTA use low-contrast color, small type, and an isolated right alignment.
issues.repair: Require a quiet contrast field and thumbnail inspection for every text block.

issues.evidence: The travel action does not visually connect to the route and train.
issues.repair: Create a dedicated footer hierarchy and use the action accent to connect promise and departure.

unresolved_assumptions: No audience recognition or preference test has been run.
